item.title: McDonald’s App Bug = Unlimited Free Food
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
0:00 Intro 0:17 McDonald’s App Bug = Unlimited Free Food 5:08 Downloading a North Korean Hacker's Computer
Sources: https://bobdahacker.com/blog/mcdonalds-security-vulnerabilities

item.title: I Downloaded a North Korean Hacker’s ENTIRE Computer
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
0:00 Intro 0:17 Who is KIM? 0:40 Leaked Espionage 1:10 Leaked VPS Credentials 1:34 Ministry of Unification Brute Force 1:50 Namecheap Fail 2:01 Leaked Browsing History... 2:13 How Kim Was Hacked 3:17 PHRACK
